source: Gates of Elikiol
masked_source: Gates of Elikiol

source: The Zeriphen are enigmatic beings whose origin is unknown. Whether through natural evolution or artificial engineering, these creatures have adapted to survive only near the boiling surface of their home star.\n\nUnable and unwilling to live on the solid surface of the planets around them, the Zeriphen seldom leave the Gates of Elikiol. Yet, when they do, their intentions are never peaceful. Their oligarchic leadership, organized in complex sets of hosts, harbors a deep hatred towards all other living beings, and is all too happy to cleanse any species that is so unlucky as to become their neighbor.
masked_source: The Zeriphen are enigmatic beings whose origin is unknown. Whether through natural evolution or artificial engineering, these creatures have adapted to survive only near the boiling surface of their home star.__PROT_0000____PROT_0001__Unable and unwilling to live on the solid surface of the planets around them, the Zeriphen seldom leave the Gates of Elikiol. Yet, when they do, their intentions are never peaceful. Their oligarchic leadership, organized in complex sets of hosts, harbors a deep hatred towards all other living beings, and is all too happy to cleanse any species that is so unlucky as to become their neighbor.

source:
The end of this epoch is upon us. 

The Highest Chorus, vibrant paragon of sublime enlightenment has thus decreed that the Gates will open, and a righteous storm of heavenly hosts will fall upon this unworthy carcass of a Galaxy, and bring an end to the filthy vermin squirming within. 

Let there be no quarter and no mercy upon the wicked, let the purest candor of our shrouds be cleansed through this monumental, cosmic bloodletting!
masked_source: The end of this epoch is upon us. __PROT_0000____PROT_0001__The Highest Chorus, vibrant paragon of sublime enlightenment has thus decreed that the Gates will open, and a righteous storm of heavenly hosts will fall upon this unworthy carcass of a Galaxy, and bring an end to the filthy vermin squirming within. __PROT_0002____PROT_0003__Let there be no quarter and no mercy upon the wicked, let the purest candor of our shrouds be cleansed through this monumental, cosmic bloodletting!

source: Enigmatic Purifiers
masked_source: Enigmatic Purifiers

source: Enigmatic Purifiers are haughty star-dwelling entities who despise organic life and feed off solar energy.
masked_source: Enigmatic Purifiers are haughty star-dwelling entities who despise organic life and feed off solar energy.

source: The disgusting sight of your form is unbearable to my senses, [From.GetSpeciesName]. Speak now and then begone.
masked_source: The disgusting sight of your form is unbearable to my senses, __PROT_0000__. Speak now and then begone.

source: You filthy, insignificant [From.GetSpeciesNamePlural] are nothing but a smear on the Galaxy, soon to be cleansed.
masked_source: You filthy, insignificant __PROT_0000__ are nothing but a smear on the Galaxy, soon to be cleansed.

source: The day of reckoning shall soon be upon you and all of your kindred, [From.GetSpeciesName]. Mark my words.
masked_source: The day of reckoning shall soon be upon you and all of your kindred, __PROT_0000__. Mark my words.

source: You are like a child, [From.GetSpeciesName], yet you expect us to listen when you speak?
masked_source: You are like a child, __PROT_0000__, yet you expect us to listen when you speak?

source: A small smear on the idyllic beauty of the Galaxy such as yourself can easily be cleansed, [From.GetSpeciesName]. Remember this when you address us.
masked_source: A small smear on the idyllic beauty of the Galaxy such as yourself can easily be cleansed, __PROT_0000__. Remember this when you address us.

source: Fear not, [From.GetSpeciesName]. Your time has not yet come. You may still address us in peaceful terms.
masked_source: Fear not, __PROT_0000__. Your time has not yet come. You may still address us in peaceful terms.

source: Beware, [From.GetSpeciesName]: the eternal eye of the [Root.GetRulerTitle] is upon you.
masked_source: Beware, __PROT_0000__: the eternal eye of the __PROT_0001__ is upon you.

source: Speak, insignificant little creature. We will entertain your senseless [From.GetRandomSpeciesSound] for a few moments.
masked_source: Speak, insignificant little creature. We will entertain your senseless __PROT_0000__ for a few moments.

source: Do not stutter in the glorious presence of the [Root.GetSpeciesNamePlural].
masked_source: Do not stutter in the glorious presence of the __PROT_0000__.

source: Our glorious host flies well beyond the limited reach of your form, [From.GetSpeciesName], yet you still talk.
masked_source: Our glorious host flies well beyond the limited reach of your form, __PROT_0000__, yet you still talk.

source: Away with you, primitive mongrel. We have no business to discuss with the likes of you.
masked_source: Away with you, primitive mongrel. We have no business to discuss with the likes of you.

source: I wonder if your mind is so feeble to make you think you could raise your hand against us and survive, [From.GetSpeciesName].
masked_source: I wonder if your mind is so feeble to make you think you could raise your hand against us and survive, __PROT_0000__.

source: We grow tired of the crass insult represented by your continued existence, [From.GetSpeciesName]. You would do well not to strain our patience any further if you wish for your kind to survive a while longer.
masked_source: We grow tired of the crass insult represented by your continued existence, __PROT_0000__. You would do well not to strain our patience any further if you wish for your kind to survive a while longer.

source: We shall not be undermined by some primitive flesh-monger, [From.GetSpeciesName]. We would sooner destroy the entire Galaxy than submit to your obscene rule.
masked_source: We shall not be undermined by some primitive flesh-monger, __PROT_0000__. We would sooner destroy the entire Galaxy than submit to your obscene rule.

source: Your continued existence has not yet caused offense great enough to the [Root.GetName] to demand your extermination, [From.GetSpeciesName]. Rejoice.
masked_source: Your continued existence has not yet caused offense great enough to the __PROT_0000__ to demand your extermination, __PROT_0001__. Rejoice.

source: Keep to your current course, [From.GetSpeciesName]. You may yet survive for another era before our reckoning.
masked_source: Keep to your current course, __PROT_0000__. You may yet survive for another era before our reckoning.

source: You are doing well to not rouse the ire of the [Root.GetRulerTitle], [From.GetSpeciesName]. The continued existence of your pitiful Empire depends on it.
masked_source: You are doing well to not rouse the ire of the __PROT_0000__, __PROT_0001__. The continued existence of your pitiful Empire depends on it.

source: There are no words to be exchanged, [From.GetSpeciesName]. Our heavenly hosts will soon wipe your pathetic kind from the face of the Galaxy.
masked_source: There are no words to be exchanged, __PROT_0000__. Our heavenly hosts will soon wipe your pathetic kind from the face of the Galaxy.

source: You should be honored to be dispatched by our [Root.GetName], [From.GetSpeciesName]. Not many can aspire to such a glorious and enlightened end.
masked_source: You should be honored to be dispatched by our __PROT_0000__, __PROT_0001__. Not many can aspire to such a glorious and enlightened end.

source: Your end is nigh, [Root.GetName]. Your false idols and miserable fleets will not shield you from the awesome might of our heavenly hosts.
masked_source: Your end is nigh, __PROT_0000__. Your false idols and miserable fleets will not shield you from the awesome might of our heavenly hosts.

source: What is your wish, [From.GetRulerTitle]?
masked_source: What is your wish, __PROT_0000__?

source: We stand by your commands, [From.GetRulerTitle]. Which enemies do you wish to see vanquished?
masked_source: We stand by your commands, __PROT_0000__. Which enemies do you wish to see vanquished?

source: Is it time for our heavenly hosts to take flight, [From.GetRulerTitle]?
masked_source: Is it time for our heavenly hosts to take flight, __PROT_0000__?

source: The age of [Root.GetSpeciesNamePlural] is at an end. You may accept your death with dignity or engage in a futile last stand. The result will be the same.
masked_source: The age of __PROT_0000__ is at an end. You may accept your death with dignity or engage in a futile last stand. The result will be the same.

source: The [From.GetRulerTitle] has ordered for a great cleansing upon the [From.GetSpeciesAdj] people. Our heavenly hosts shall fly upon your worlds and purify them from the wickedness of your flesh.
masked_source: The __PROT_0000__ has ordered for a great cleansing upon the __PROT_0001__ people. Our heavenly hosts shall fly upon your worlds and purify them from the wickedness of your flesh.

source: The time has come for this [From.GetSpeciesAdj] infestation to be healed. The [Root.GetRulerTitle] has so decreed: that no [From.GetSpeciesName] nor [From.GetSpeciesSpawnName] be spared.
masked_source: The time has come for this __PROT_0000__ infestation to be healed. The __PROT_0001__ has so decreed: that no __PROT_0002__ nor __PROT_0003__ be spared.

source: Your unholy conduct has incurred in the wrath of the [From.GetName], [Root.GetSpeciesName]. Prepare to be extinguished.
masked_source: Your unholy conduct has incurred in the wrath of the __PROT_0000__, __PROT_0001__. Prepare to be extinguished.

source: Prepare yourselves, [Root.GetSpeciesNamePlural]: the time for your species to be purified is at hand.
masked_source: Prepare yourselves, __PROT_0000__: the time for your species to be purified is at hand.

source: Pathetic smear of intergalactic dust. You are not worthy of even gazing upon our sacred forms.
masked_source: Pathetic smear of intergalactic dust. You are not worthy of even gazing upon our sacred forms.

source: Begone from this Galaxy, you insignificant smudge of matter.
masked_source: Begone from this Galaxy, you insignificant smudge of matter.

source: Your miserable attempts to preserve this pitiful Empire are doomed to failure, as all things mundane are.
masked_source: Your miserable attempts to preserve this pitiful Empire are doomed to failure, as all things mundane are.

source: Know that, when the time will come for us to end your species, all of your so-called accomplishments will be but an insignificant dot of imperfection in the eternal harmony of the Galaxy.
masked_source: Know that, when the time will come for us to end your species, all of your so-called accomplishments will be but an insignificant dot of imperfection in the eternal harmony of the Galaxy.

source: Your efforts are meaningless and your results repulsive. End yourselves with dignity before we are forced to sully our lances with your wretched ichor.
masked_source: Your efforts are meaningless and your results repulsive. End yourselves with dignity before we are forced to sully our lances with your wretched ichor.

source: Our heavenly hosts sing of your incumbent, inevitable end. All that you are shall soon be undone.
masked_source: Our heavenly hosts sing of your incumbent, inevitable end. All that you are shall soon be undone.

source: Your insolence shall be your undoing, you repulsive pest.
masked_source: Your insolence shall be your undoing, you repulsive pest.

source: Do not test our patience. Its borders are what keeps your species from utter annihilation.
masked_source: Do not test our patience. Its borders are what keeps your species from utter annihilation.

source: Your vulgar antics are of no consequence to us. We are beings of a far higher nature than what lays within your limited understanding.
masked_source: Your vulgar antics are of no consequence to us. We are beings of a far higher nature than what lays within your limited understanding.

source: The time for your species to be cleansed will soon come. Do you long for death so much to taunt us in such manners?
masked_source: The time for your species to be cleansed will soon come. Do you long for death so much to taunt us in such manners?
